2605.02545.title: Strategy-Aware Optimization Modeling with Reasoning LLMs
2605.02545.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) can generate syntactically valid optimization programs, yet often struggle to reliably choose an effective modeling strategy, leading to incorrect formulations and inefficient solver behavior. We propose SAGE, a strategy-aware framework that makes Modeling Strategy explicit in both data construction and post-training. SAGE builds a solver-verified multi-strategy dataset and trains a student model with supervised fine-tuning followed by Segment-Weighted GRPO using a composite reward over format compliance, correctness, and solver efficiency. Across eight benchmarks spanning synthetic and real-world settings, SAGE improves average pass@1 from 72.7 to 80.3 over the strongest open-source baseline. With multiple generations, SAGE discovers more distinct correct formulations and improves component-level diversity at pass@16 by 19-29%. At the largest scale, SAGE produces more compact constraint systems with 14.2% fewer constraints than the baseline, consistent with solver-efficient modeling. Overall, these results show that making Modeling Strategy explicit improves automated optimization modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/rachhhhing/SAGE.
2605.02545.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）可以生成語法上有效的優化程序，但往往難以可靠地選擇有效的建模策略，導致不正確的公式和低效的求解器行為。<lb/>我們提出了SAGE，一個策略感知框架，使建模策略在數據構建和訓練後變得明確。<lb/>SAGE構建了一個經求解器驗證的多策略數據集，並通過監督微調訓練學生模型，隨後使用基於格式合規性、正確性和求解器效率的複合獎勵進行段加權GRPO。<lb/>在涵蓋合成和現實世界設置的八個基準測試中，SAGE將平均pass@1從72.7提高到80.3，超過了最強的開源基線。<lb/>通過多次生成，SAGE發現了更多獨特的正確公式，並在pass@16上提高了19-29%的組件級多樣性。<lb/>在最大規模下，SAGE生成的約束系統比基線少14.2%的約束，與求解器高效建模一致。<lb/>總體而言，這些結果表明，明確建模策略可以改善自動化優化建模。<lb/>代碼可在https://github.com/rachhhhing/SAGE獲得。
2605.02545.author: Ruiqing Zhao et.al.
2605.02545.authors: Ruiqing Zhao, Fengzhi Li, Yuan Zuo, Rui Liu, Yansong Liu, Yunfei Ma, Fanyu Meng, Junlan Feng
